name: Plane
summary: Represents the value of a center point and two axes in a plane in three dimensions.

constructors.name: Plane(Point3d, Vector3d)
constructors.summary: Constructs a plane from a point and a normal vector.

constructors.name: Plane(Point3d, Point3d, Point3d)
constructors.signature: public Plane(Point3d origin, Point3d xPoint, Point3d yPoint)
constructors.summary: Initializes a plane from three non-collinear points.

params.name: xPoint
params.doc: Second point in the plane. The x-axis will be parallel to x_point-origin.

params.name: yPoint
params.doc: Third point on the plane that is not collinear with the first two points. taxis*(y_point-origin) will be > 0.

constructors.name: Plane(Point3d, Vector3d, Vector3d)
constructors.signature: public Plane(Point3d origin, Vector3d xDirection, Vector3d yDirection)
constructors.summary: Constructs a plane from a point and two vectors in the plane.

params.name: xDirection
params.doc: Non-zero vector in the plane that determines the x-axis direction.

params.name: yDirection
params.doc: Non-zero vector not parallel to x_dir that is used to determine the y-axis direction. y_dir does not need to be perpendicular to x_dir.

constructors.name: Plane(Double, Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public Plane(double a, double b, double c, double d)
constructors.summary: Constructs a plane from an equation Ax+By+Cz+D=0.

methods.name: Clone
methods.signature: public Plane Clone()
methods.summary: Returns a deep copy of this instance.

returns.doc: A plane with the same values as this item.

methods.name: ClosestParameter
methods.signature: public bool ClosestParameter(Point3d testPoint, out double s, out double t)
methods.summary: Gets the parameters of the point on the plane closest to a test point.

returns.doc: true if a parameter could be found, false if the point could not be projected successfully.

methods.name: ClosestPoint
methods.signature: public Point3d ClosestPoint(Point3d testPoint)
methods.summary: Gets the point on the plane closest to a test point.

returns.doc: The point on the plane that is closest to testPoint, or Point3d.Unset on failure.

methods.name: CreateFromFrame
methods.signature: public static Plane CreateFromFrame(Point3d origin, Vector3d xDirection, Vector3d yDirection)
methods.summary: Constructs a plane from a point, and two vectors in the plane.

params.name: xDirection
params.doc: Non-zero vector in the plane that determines the XAxis direction.

params.name: yDirection
params.doc: Non-zero vector not parallel to xDirection that is used to determine the YAxis direction. Note, yDirection does not have to be perpendicular to xDirection.

returns.doc: A valid plane if successful, or Plane.Unset on failure.

methods.name: CreateFromNormal
methods.signature: public static Plane CreateFromNormal(Point3d origin, Vector3d normal)
methods.summary: Constructs a plane from a point and normal vector.

returns.doc: A valid plane if successful, or Plane.Unset on failure.

methods.name: CreateFromNormalYup
methods.signature: public static Plane CreateFromNormalYup(Point3d origin, Vector3d normal, Vector3d yDirection)
methods.summary: Construct a plane from a point, a normal vector, and a vector that projects to the positive YAxis.

params.name: yDirection
params.doc: Non-zero vector, linearly independent from normal, that projects to the positive YAxis of the plane.

returns.doc: A valid plane if successful, or Plane.Unset on failure.

methods.name: CreateFromPoints
methods.signature: public static Plane CreateFromPoints(Point3d origin, Point3d xPoint, Point3d yPoint)
methods.summary: Construct a plane from three non-collinear points.

params.name: xPoint
params.doc: Second point in the plane. XAxis will be parallel to xPoint-origin.

params.name: yPoint
params.doc: Third point on the plane that is not collinear with the first two points, where YAxis*(yPoint-origin) will be > 0.

returns.doc: A valid plane if successful, or Plane.Unset on failure.

methods.name: DistanceTo(Point3d)
methods.signature: public double DistanceTo(Point3d testPoint)
methods.summary: Returns the signed distance from testPoint to its projection onto this plane. If the point is below the plane, a negative distance is returned.

returns.doc: Signed distance from this plane to testPoint.

methods.name: DistanceTo(BoundingBox, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public bool DistanceTo(BoundingBox bbox, out double min, out double max)
methods.summary: Returns the signed minimum and maximum distances from bounding box to this plane.

params.name: bbox
params.doc: bounding box to get distances from

params.name: min
params.doc: minimum signed distance from plane to box

params.name: max
params.doc: maximum signed distance from plane to box

returns.doc: false if plane has zero length normal

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(Plane other, double epsilon)
methods.summary: Check that all values in other are within epsilon of the values in this

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.Geometry.Plane.EpsilonEquals(Rhino.Geometry.Plane,System.Double)"]

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.signature: public override bool Equals(Object obj)
methods.summary: Determines if an object is a plane and has the same components as this plane.

returns.doc: true if obj is a plane and has the same components as this plane; false otherwise.

methods.name: Equals(Plane)
methods.signature: public bool Equals(Plane plane)
methods.summary: Determines if another plane has the same components as this plane.

returns.doc: true if plane has the same components as this plane; false otherwise.

methods.name: ExtendThroughBox(BoundingBox, Interval, Interval)
methods.signature: public bool ExtendThroughBox(BoundingBox box, out Interval s, out Interval t)
methods.summary: Extends this plane through a bounding box.

params.name: box
params.doc: A box to use as minimal extension boundary.

params.name: s
params.doc: If this function returns true, the s parameter returns the Interval on the plane along the X direction that will encompass the Box.

params.name: t
params.doc: If this function returns true, the t parameter returns the Interval on the plane along the Y direction that will encompass the Box.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ExtendThroughBox(Box, Interval, Interval)
methods.signature: public bool ExtendThroughBox(Box box, out Interval s, out Interval t)
methods.summary: Extend this plane through a Box.

params.name: box
params.doc: A box to use for extension.

params.name: s
params.doc: If this function returns true, the s parameter returns the Interval on the plane along the X direction that will encompass the Box.

params.name: t
params.doc: If this function returns true, the t parameter returns the Interval on the plane along the Y direction that will encompass the Box.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: FitPlaneToPoints(IEnumerable<Point3d>, Plane)
methods.signature: public static PlaneFitResult FitPlaneToPoints(IEnumerable<Point3d> points, out Plane plane)
methods.summary: Fit a plane through a collection of points.

returns.doc: A value indicating the result of the operation.

methods.name: FitPlaneToPoints(IEnumerable<Point3d>, Plane, Double)
methods.signature: public static PlaneFitResult FitPlaneToPoints(IEnumerable<Point3d> points, out Plane plane, out double maximumDeviation)
methods.summary: Fit a plane through a collection of points.

params.name: maximumDeviation
params.doc: The distance from the furthest point to the plane.

returns.doc: A value indicating the result of the operation.

methods.name: Flip
methods.signature: public void Flip()
methods.summary: Flip this plane by swapping out the X and Y axes and inverting the Z axis.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.signature: public override int GetHashCode()
methods.summary: Gets a non-unique hashing code for this entity.

returns.doc: A particular number for a specific instance of plane.

methods.name: GetPlaneEquation
methods.signature: public double[] GetPlaneEquation()
methods.summary: Gets the plane equation for this plane in the format of Ax+By+Cz+D=0.

returns.doc: Array of four values.

methods.name: IsCoplanar(Plane)
methods.signature: public bool IsCoplanar(Plane plane)
methods.summary: Test if this plane is co-planar with a another plane.

returns.doc: True if this plane is co-planar with the test plane, false otherwise.

methods.name: IsCoplanar(Plane, Double)
methods.signature: public bool IsCoplanar(Plane plane, double tolerance)
methods.summary: Test if this plane is co-planar with a another plane.

returns.doc: True if this plane is co-planar with the test plane, false otherwise.

methods.name: PointAt(Double, Double)
methods.signature: public Point3d PointAt(double u, double v)
methods.summary: Evaluate a point on the plane.

returns.doc: plane.origin + u*plane.xaxis + v*plane.yaxis.

methods.name: PointAt(Double, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public Point3d PointAt(double u, double v, double w)
methods.summary: Evaluate a point on the plane.

returns.doc: plane.origin + u*plane.xaxis + v*plane.yaxis + z*plane.zaxis.

methods.name: RemapToPlaneSpace
methods.signature: public bool RemapToPlaneSpace(Point3d ptSample, out Point3d ptPlane)
methods.summary: Convert a point from World space coordinates into Plane space coordinates.
methods.remarks: D stands for distance, not disease.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Rotate(Double, Vector3d)
methods.signature: public bool Rotate(double angle, Vector3d axis)
methods.summary: Rotate the plane about its origin point.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Rotate(Double, Vector3d, Point3d)
methods.signature: public bool Rotate(double angle, Vector3d axis, Point3d centerOfRotation)
methods.summary: Rotate the plane about a custom anchor point.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Rotate(Double, Double, Vector3d)
methods.signature: public bool Rotate(double sinAngle, double cosAngle, Vector3d axis)
methods.summary: Rotate the plane about its origin point.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Rotate(Double, Double, Vector3d, Point3d)
methods.signature: public bool Rotate(double sinAngle, double cosAngle, Vector3d axis, Point3d centerOfRotation)
methods.summary: Rotate the plane about a custom anchor point.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ToString()
methods.signature: public override string ToString()
methods.summary: Constructs the string representation of this plane.

returns.doc: Text.

methods.name: ToString(String, IFormatProvider)
methods.signature: public string ToString(string format, IFormatProvider formatProvider)
methods.summary: Formats the value of the current instance using the specified format.

params.name: format
params.doc: The format to use. -or- A null reference (null in Visual Basic) to use the default format defined for the type of the IFormattable implementation.

params.name: formatProvider
params.doc: The provider to use to format the value. -or- A null reference (null in Visual Basic) to obtain the numeric format information from the current locale setting of the operating system.

returns.doc: The value of the current instance in the specified format.

methods.name: Transform
methods.signature: public bool Transform(Transform xform)
methods.summary: Transform the plane with a Transformation matrix.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Translate
methods.signature: public bool Translate(Vector3d delta)
methods.summary: Translate (move) the plane along a vector.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: UpdateEquation
methods.signature: public bool UpdateEquation()
methods.summary: Update Equations

returns.doc: bool

methods.name: ValueAt
methods.signature: public double ValueAt(Point3d p)
methods.summary: Get the value of the plane equation at the point.

returns.doc: returns pe[0]*p.X + pe[1]*p.Y + pe[2]*p.Z + pe[3] where pe[0], pe[1], pe[2] and pe[3] are the coefficients of the plane equation.

methods.name: Equality
methods.signature: public static bool operator ==(Plane a, Plane b)
methods.summary: Determines if two planes are equal.

returns.doc: true if the two planes have all equal components; false otherwise.

methods.name: Inequality
methods.signature: public static bool operator !=(Plane a, Plane b)
methods.summary: Determines if two planes are different.

returns.doc: true if the two planes have any different component components; false otherwise.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not this is a valid plane. A plane is considered to be valid when all fields contain reasonable information and the equation jibes with point and z-axis.

properties.name: Normal
properties.summary: Gets the normal of this plane. This is essentially the ZAxis of the plane.

properties.name: Origin
properties.summary: Gets or sets the origin point of this plane.

properties.name: OriginX
properties.summary: Gets or sets the X coordinate of the origin of this plane.

properties.name: OriginY
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Y coordinate of the origin of this plane.

properties.name: OriginZ
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Z coordinate of the origin of this plane.

properties.name: Unset
properties.summary: Gets a plane that contains Unset origin and axis vectors.

properties.name: WorldXY
properties.summary: plane coincident with the World XY plane.

properties.name: WorldYZ
properties.summary: plane coincident with the World YZ plane.

properties.name: WorldZX
properties.summary: plane coincident with the World ZX plane.

properties.name: XAxis
properties.summary: Gets or sets the X axis vector of this plane.

properties.name: YAxis
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Y axis vector of this plane.

properties.name: ZAxis
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Z axis vector of this plane.
